rulings.Case Title: IN RE: CHRISTOPHER NOE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition To Expunge Mechanics Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 17, 2016, line 1. PETITIONER CHRISTOPHER NOE, VERONICA SMITH Notice Of Petition To Expunge Mechanics Lien GRANTED. Request for attorney's fees is denied. Counsel's declaration fails to provide any evidence of reasonableness of fees (hours, rate, experience, etc.). = (501/REQ)
